overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a post-apocalyptic survival game showing a character exploring an overgrown abandoned suburban neighborhood in rainy, overcast conditions. The character walks through tall grass and past derelict houses and vehicles before entering a house and discovering bodies in the backyard.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense overgrown grass in a post-apocalyptic suburban neighborhood. Abandoned vehicles and derelict houses line the path, with a wooden fence visible ahead. The atmosphere is quiet and desolate under overcast skies.

events.description: character turns slightly right toward the target house entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along cracked pavement toward a specific abandoned house, passing derelict vehicles on the left

entered.detail: dark blue van with open doors sitting in the grass
primary abandoned house with wooden siding and front porch
rusted pickup truck in the driveway
standard residential mailbox near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the neighborhood along a cracked asphalt path, approaching a specific two-story house. A blue van and abandoned pickup truck mark the driveway as the character heads toward the front entrance.

events.description: character enters the dark abandoned house from the front porch
character exits through the back door onto a wooden porch
dead bodies discovered lying in the backyard grass

agents.ego_description: entering the dark abandoned house, moving through the interior rooms, and exiting to the backyard where bodies are discovered

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down in the backyard grass near the porch

wooden dining table with chairs in the main room
wooden deck with railings at the back of the house
small gray shed in the backyard
stack of concrete blocks in the yard
plastic garbage bins near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark interior of the abandoned house, passing through a dining area with wooden furniture. After traversing the dimly lit rooms, they exit to a back porch and discover dead bodies lying in the overgrown backyard near a shed and concrete blocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate suburban neighborhood that transitions from an overgrown outdoor wasteland into the grim interior and backyard of an abandoned home. It begins with the character pushing through dense grass past derelict houses and abandoned vehicles under a quiet, overcast sky. As the path shifts to cracked asphalt, the camera tracks the character toward a specific two-story house marked by a blue van and a pickup truck in the driveway. The scene then moves from the open air into the dark, dimly lit interior of the residence, passing through a dining area with wooden furniture. Finally, the camera follows the character out onto a back porch, where the view opens up to reveal dead bodies lying in an overgrown backyard near a shed and concrete blocks.
